formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}t_{r , b}^{r e s t r i c t} & = & \underset{c \in C_{b} \cap C_{m}}{\sum} \left(z_{r , c}^{1} \underset{l \in L_{b}^{r e s}}{\sum} \left(w_{l} / min \left\{v_{l , r} , v_{c}^{1} \right\} + t_{r , l}^{r e c o}\right) + z_{r , c}^{2} \underset{l \in L_{b}^{r e s}}{\sum} \left(w_{l} / min \left\{v_{l , r} , v_{c}^{2} \right\} + t_{r , l}^{r e c o}\right)\right) \\ & & + \underset{l \in L_{b}^{u n r e s}}{\sum} \left(t_{r , l} + t_{r , l}^{r e c o}\right) \forall b \in B_{r} \backslash B^{a}\end{aligned}

formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}t_{r , b}^{r e s t r i c t} & = & \underset{c \in C_{b} \cap C_{m}}{\sum} \left(z_{r , c}^{1} \underset{l \in L_{b}^{r e s , a}}{\sum} \left(w_{l} / min \left\{v_{l , r} , v_{c}^{1} \right\} + t_{r , l}^{r e c o}\right) + z_{r , c}^{2} \underset{l \in L_{b}^{r e s , a}}{\sum} \left(w_{l} / min \left\{v_{l , r} , v_{c}^{2} \right\} + t_{r , l}^{r e c o}\right)\right) \\ & & + \underset{l \in L_{b , c}^{u n r e s , a}}{\sum} \left(t_{r , l} + t_{r , l}^{r e c o}\right) \forall b \in B^{a}\end{aligned}
